title: 7 Herbal Tinctures for Infant Burping Relief
description: Origanum vulgare tinctures, also known as oregano tincture, is a natural remedy that may help with burping. Oregano contains compounds like carvacrol and thymol, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties can help soothe the digestive tract and reduce bloating, making it easier to digest food. When you take oregano tincture, it helps to calm down the stomach muscles, reducing the frequency and severity of burping. To use oregano tincture for burping, st...
